utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 fields. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: (1) destination: provided (Athens, Greece) – fully specified. (2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates – fully specified. (3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; provided type, round-trip note, economy, and a cost amount, but lacks specific flight details (airline, flight numbers, times), so not fully specified. (4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs; provided name, stay details, and cost – fully specified (though 5-night stay conflicts with 4-night dates, but still has cost and selection). (5) activities: selected activities with costs; provided two activities with details and costs – fully specified. (6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; provided as empty array – acceptable as explicitly included, no costs needed. (7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; provided total_cost and budget_limit, but not a breakdown by component beyond individual item costs; however the presence of itemized costs plus total and limit reasonably counts as provided. The only item clearly not fully specified per format is transportation flight details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package, the identifiable items that have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings are: destination 'Athens, Greece'; transportation 'Budget Airline, Economy Class' which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class; accommodation 'Adventure Lodge'; activities 'Scuba Diving Excursion' and 'Rock Climbing'. No additional services were selected. Therefore, map each of these to their exact ratings from the ground truth.
